scenarios.name: baseline
transmission_channels: macro consensus path feeds PPNR and credit costs at trend
assumptions: consensus macro forecast as of the reference date

scenarios.name: adverse
transmission_channels: GDP contraction and rising unemployment raise PD/LGD and credit provisions (CET1)
widening BBB spreads compress AFS securities value and wholesale funding access (CET1, LCR)
equity drawdown reduces market-sensitive fee income and pledged-collateral value (LCR)
assumptions: no rating downgrade of the firm

scenarios.name: severely_adverse
transmission_channels: deep recession sharply lifts defaults and provisions across retail and wholesale books (CET1)
sharp spread widening drives AFS/OCI losses and funding stress (CET1, LCR)
equity and property collapse cut collateral values and trigger margin/redemption outflows (LCR)
assumptions: partial deposit runoff on uninsured balances

reverse_stress.interpretation: the severely_adverse shock vector would need to be amplified about 1.42x for cet1_ratio to reach its 4.5 limit

disclaimer: Scenario design evidence and recommendations only; not an approved stress scenario, a capital or liquidity decision, a set limit, or a regulatory submission. Human adjudication (risk committee / model risk / board) is required before adoption.
narrative: Scenario design pack sdp-DEMO-2026-07-15 covers 3 scenarios (baseline, adverse, severely_adverse) over a 9-quarter horizon against 2 binding constraints (cet1_ratio, lcr). Impact-weighted severity increases monotonically across the ladder (0.00 -> 11.38 -> 24.22). Under severely_adverse, projected CET1 declines to 6.68% (distance to the 4.50% minimum: +2.18pp) and LCR to 119.0% (distance to the 100% minimum: +19.0pp); neither binding constraint is projected to be reached within full severity. Reverse stress on cet1_ratio produces a scaling multiple of 1.42x, i.e. the severely_adverse shock vector would need to be amplified about 1.42x for CET1 to reach its 4.50% minimum. Every shock lies within the documented plausibility bands and each scenario carries transmission channels, assumptions, and management actions, so the deterministic readiness band is Ready-for-review. These are design evidence and recommendations for the risk committee and model-risk function to challenge and adjudicate before any use.
